tree.name: OG Anunoby
tree.tradeDescription: NYK traded RJ Barrett, Immanuel Quickley, and a 2024 2nd (DET own) to Toronto for Precious Achiuwa, OG Anunoby, and Malachi Flynn

assetsGivenUp.name: Immanuel Quickley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team draft-night trade: NYK traded a 2020 1st to MIN; OKC traded Immanuel Quickley (#25) to NYK; MIN/OKC also exchanged players and picks
assetsGivenUp.note: Quickley was selected by OKC and traded to NYK as part of a 3-team deal on draft night.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 1st Round Pick (#23)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK's own 2020 1st round pick, traded to Minnesota in the 3-team draft-night deal

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick via DET
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from LAC in the Keon Johnson/Quentin Grimes draft-night trade. Originally DET's 2024 2nd. Sent to Toronto in OG trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Keon Johnson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Part of Keon Johnson (#21) to LAC for Quentin Grimes (#25) + this DET 2024 2nd
